system.description:
Your gravity bends fate to its will, drawing your wishes to you. At the end of a Mission, while spending Time, give the GM a list of 7 things written on a piece of paper. During the next Mission, 3 of those things must come within one meter of you and be pointed out to you directly.

When each does, cross it out. If at least three things don’t appear, the next Mission begins with 10 fewer Chaos. This can send starting Chaos into the negatives.

Each Mission after the first use, you can choose to leave the list as-is (shorter, if items were crossed out) or add 3 items exactly. If there are fewer than 3 items on the list, the GM is only required to fulfill what’s on the list. You cannot remove items, and no items can ever be placed on the list a second time. If the list has zero items, it must be replenished fully back to 7 on the next use.

If you ask for something genuinely impossible within Reality, the heavens still provide: the GM can declare a meteor falls near you at an opportune moment, assisting you in some way, to cross something off the list.
